scripts.dev:job-coach: echo 'Job Coach DEV — http://localhost:3000' && APP_ENV=development NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=development PORT=3000 pnpm --filter job-coach-web dev
scripts.prd:job-coach: echo 'Job Coach PRD — http://localhost:3001' && APP_ENV=production NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV=production PORT=3001 pnpm --filter job-coach-web start
scripts.build:job-coach:prd: echo '🔴 Building Job Coach PRD' && APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter job-coach-web build
scripts.db:reset:dev: APP_ENV=development pnpm tsx scripts/require-dev-env.ts && supabase db reset
scripts.db:reset: APP_ENV=development pnpm tsx scripts/require-dev-env.ts && supabase db reset
